title: attendance — product analytics

events.name: Absence Freeze Threshold Reached
events.description: P1 event. Consent tier: essential — the athlete's membership just got frozen; this is a system-integrity signal.

events.name: No Show Fee Charged
events.description: Consent tier: essential — money-side signal for revenue reconciliation.

notes: Analytics NEVER carry raw device_fingerprint_hash / ip_address / gps_lat / gps_lng — those live in confidential columns for fraud correlation only.
Analytics NEVER carry raw absence_reason free-text or explanation — reasons are bucketed via absence_reason_bucket (medical / family / vacation / transportation / other).
minutes_late bucketed as (0-5 / 6-15 / 16-30 / 31-60 / >60) — prevents identity inference via precise timestamps.
fee_amount bucketed as (under_20 / under_50 / under_200 / over_200) — same reason.
session_type + venue never propagate — those are contextual to sports/session's own analytics.
Guardian consent for analytics tier gates every event via consent_required — essential events fire regardless (they're system-integrity signals).
